basic_details.short_information: STPINEXT Recruitment 2026 for post of Chief Operating Officer (COO). Candidates with MBA, M.E/M.Tech, B.E/B.Tech, M.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 18-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through STPINEXT official website.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 20 days from the date of publication

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's in Technology/Engineering or Master in Technology/Engineering/Science or MBA. Minimum 8 years of overall experience in IT industry, start-up ecosystem as co-founder/founder/CxO or as an enabler of Start-up, Innovation & entrepreneurship ecosystem.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the STPINEXT Chief Operating Officer (COO) Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: STPINEXT Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
